purpose: Generate structured research queries from a normalized user intent so downstream search, evidence extraction, and review stages can operate on explicit question variants instead of raw prose.

endpoints.description: Expand a normalized request into ranked search queries with intent labels and optional constraints.

sidecar_specification.purpose: Generate structured search queries from normalized research intent.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use after intent normalization and before controlled search, retrieval, or evidence extraction steps.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a web browser, citation formatter, or final answer generator.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Normalize the user request. 2) Call /research/queries/generate. 3) Pass the ranked query set into a controlled search or retrieval boundary.

common_calls.description: Generate search queries for a research task

input_example.request_text: Find recent evidence for strict schema validation in agent tool brokers

queries.text: agent tool broker schema validation evidence

failure_modes.condition: Input request is too vague to generate differentiated query variants
failure_modes.symptom: Low-diversity queries or explicit validation rejection
failure_modes.recovery: Add missing subject, timeframe, or evidence-type constraints before retrying

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Accept normalized intent fields, generate multiple query rewrites with explicit labels such as primary, supporting, and risk-check, and keep the output structured enough for deterministic downstream consumption.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Query generation tends to leak into actual search or summarization; keep it as a pure planning stage so downstream tools remain separately testable.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Use typed query objects with priority ordering and optional constraints rather than returning one concatenated string.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not fetch sources or synthesize evidence inside the planner.

body.request_text: Find recent evidence for strict schema validation in agent tool brokers
